instruction: Help me record the budget execution status

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Department'
ws['B1'] = 'Annual Budget(10K CNY)'
ws['C1'] = 'Q1 Actual(10K CNY)'
ws['D1'] = 'Q1 Usage(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'R&D Dept'
ws['B2'] = 800
ws['C2'] = 195
ws['D2'] = 97.5
ws['A3'] = 'Sales Dept'
ws['B3'] = 600
ws['C3'] = 138
ws['D3'] = 92.0
ws['A4'] = 'Marketing Dept'
ws['B4'] = 400
ws['C4'] = 105
ws['D4'] = 105.0
ws['A5'] = 'Admin Dept'
ws['B5'] = 200
ws['C5'] = 48
ws['D5'] = 96.0
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/dept_budget.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the budget execution status

Find the department with Q1 usage rate exceeding 100% from /home/user/Desktop/dept_budget.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/budget_alert.txt: 'Q1 Over-budget Department: Marketing Dept (Usage 105%)', save
